items.title: Clean 8bc outreach/follow-up suppression-heavy list before next send
acceptance_criteria: Move or mark bounced/suppressed recipients from the latest follow-up probe out of active follow-up eligibility.
Prefer personal verified contacts before the next 8bc outreach batch; do not send to role-based or suppressed addresses.
Record the cleaned counts and next send-safe segment in the PNW/outreach ledger.

items.title: Enrich Miller's Heating & Air before any 8bc PNW outreach send
acceptance_criteria: Find a non-role-based decision-maker route or mark the row LinkedIn-only with an explicit enrichment blocker.
Keep info@millersheating.com out of sendable email batches unless a prior relationship or verified routing reason is recorded.
Rerun python3 tools/verify-pnw-outreach-queue.py and record the clean result before the next PNW send.
